name: Yunus Emre Erkesikbaş
title: Software Developer | SAP CX & Angular & Next.js
tagline: I engineer high-performance e-commerce frontends — SAP CX & Angular for B2B/B2C enterprise, Next.js for SEO-driven global storefronts. Actively growing into fullstack, with a sharpening focus on backend.
bio: I'm Emre, a Software Developer proficient in JavaScript, React, Next.js, SAP Spartacus, and Angular. I craft captivating e-commerce frontends — experienced across B2B/B2C SAP Commerce, multi-country/multi-currency storefronts, SEO optimization, and 3rd-party integrations. Collaboration is my superpower. Always learning, always growing.

education.description: M.Sc. programme (2026–2028): thesis topic and specialization will be confirmed with the department — this profile will be updated when there is a public summary.

highlights: SAP CX & Spartacus B2C/B2B Commerce projects
Client projects: Yataş, Puffy, Vakko, Mavi
Hybris B2C and B2B e-commerce consultant across multiple brands
Next.js B2C e-commerce project integration including SEO, Account, Order, and Payment flows
PHP, Laravel, and CodeIgniter for backend and API services
UI integration and bug fixing development
Backend and API services with PHP and Laravel

personal.languages: Native Turkish. English: used daily in international engineering teams for code reviews, agile ceremonies, technical writing, and stakeholder alignment. No IELTS, TOEFL, or published CEFR band is listed on this public profile.
personal.hobbies: Enjoys travel, staying active, fitness, and tennis; watches football matches; likes listening to music; also spends downtime building personal software projects.
personal.currentlyLearning: Deepening backend skills and the Spring ecosystem (aligned with Craftive full-stack delivery).
personal.community: Public engineering presence mainly through GitHub and LinkedIn (see Social links below). No conference talks or meetup series are listed on this public profile — ask if you want to connect via those channels.
personal.workValues: Collaboration-first (also reflected in the bio); pragmatic about shipping features on large storefronts while keeping UX, SEO, and integration boundaries clear.
personal.personality: From the public bio and notes on file: team-oriented and learning-minded; stays pragmatic under scope on large commerce frontends; curious hands-on builder after hours through sport, travel, music, and personal coding projects. No formal personality-test results are published here.
personal.certifications: No named exam or vendor certificates appear on this public profile yet.
personal.freelancePreferences: Open to freelance and side projects (see availability label). Prefers well-scoped work in SAP CX storefronts, Angular or Next.js apps, or Craftive-adjacent Spring/Next delivery. Remote-friendly async collaboration preferred; concrete rates, hours, and time zones should be discussed via email or LinkedIn.
